name: Software Engineer
tagline: Design and ship robust systems that stand the test of scale.
description: Core computer science, systems design, and the craft of building software that lasts.

milestones.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
milestones.learning_goal: Reason about time and space, and pick the right structure for the job.

weekend_project.title: Pathfinding Visualizer
weekend_project.brief: Build an interactive visualizer for BFS/DFS/A*.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which structure changed your solution's complexity class?

milestones.title: Object-Oriented & Clean Design
milestones.learning_goal: Model problems with cohesive, loosely-coupled abstractions.

weekend_project.title: Domain Model Kata
weekend_project.brief: Model a real domain and refactor toward SOLID.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which pattern removed the most duplication?

milestones.title: APIs & Backend Services
milestones.learning_goal: Design HTTP APIs that are predictable, documented, and safe.

weekend_project.title: Production-Grade API
weekend_project.brief: Ship a documented API with auth and tests.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How does your API fail gracefully under bad input?

milestones.title: Databases & Persistence
milestones.learning_goal: Choose and use the right store, and keep data consistent.

weekend_project.title: Migration-Safe Schema
weekend_project.brief: Evolve a schema across versions with zero downtime.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What breaks if two writes race?

milestones.title: Systems Design
milestones.learning_goal: Design systems that scale in load, data, and team size.

weekend_project.title: Design a URL Shortener
weekend_project.brief: Produce a full design doc with tradeoffs.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where is your single point of failure?

milestones.title: Testing, CI/CD & Delivery
milestones.learning_goal: Automate quality so shipping is boring and safe.

weekend_project.title: Zero-to-Deploy Pipeline
weekend_project.brief: Automate build, test, and deploy for a service.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How fast can you safely roll back?
